medianCeoPay.label: Median realised pay, ASX100 CEO, FY24
medianCeoPay.source: ACSI CEO Pay in ASX200 Companies, June 2025

topCeoPay.name: Victor Herrero, Lovisa
topCeoPay.label: Highest realised pay in the ACSI FY24 sample
topCeoPay.source: ACSI CEO Pay in ASX200 Companies, June 2025

muskNetWorth.name: Elon Musk
muskNetWorth.label: Richest person on earth, net worth (not salary; no salary gets you here)
muskNetWorth.source: Forbes / Bloomberg Billionaires Index, July 2026, ~US$1 trillion

ictGradsPerYear.label: Domestic university ICT completions a year, before counting international completions which more than double it
ictGradsPerYear.source: NSW ICT Industry Landscape Report / ACS Digital Pulse

gradStillLookingShares.label: Share of each cohort still hunting: everyone at graduation, then a decaying tail
gradStillLookingShares.source: First-year figure anchored to GOS 2024 (IT full-time employment fell 6.6 points; roughly one in four computing grads had no full-time job 4-6 months out). Later years are our labelled guess.

applicationsPerAd.label: Applications per job ad (adjustable assumption)
applicationsPerAd.source: SEEK Employment Report May 2025: applications per ad at record high, up 16.4% year on year; absolute counts unpublished, so pick your own poison
